节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Provides http related APIs.
Http Proxy Configuration Information.
Creates an HTTP request task.
注释信息: @returns { HttpRequest } the HttpRequest of the createHttp.

节点.功能描述: Enum for Address Family
Default, can use addresses of all IP versions that your system allows.
ONLYV4 Uses only IPv4 addresses.
ONLYV6 Uses only IPv6 addresses.
Specifies the type and value range of the optional parameters in the HTTP request.
Request method,default is GET.
Additional data of the request. extraData can be a string or an Object (API 6) or an ArrayBuffer(API 8).
Data type to be returned. If this parameter is set, the system preferentially returns the specified type.
default is true
[1, 1000], default is 1.
HTTP request header. default is 'content-type': 'application/json'
Read timeout period. The default value is 60,000, in ms.
Connection timeout interval. The default value is 60,000, in ms.
default is automatically specified by the system.
If this parameter is set as type of boolean, the system will use default proxy or not use proxy. If this parameter is set as type of HttpProxy, the system will use the specified HttpProxy.
If this parameter is set, the system will use ca path specified by user, or else use preset ca by the system.

A PEM representation of a certificate. The system will create an X.509 certificate object in the SSL process. If the caPath option is set, the caData option will be ignored. Certificate chain is not supported. Maxium length is 8000 Bytes.
Which secure communication protocol is used, TLS (by defaul) or TLCP. If TLCP is used, all TLS related options, such as caPath, caData and clientCert, are ignored.
Support the application to pass in client certificates, allowing the server to verify the client's encryption identity.

Used to set to uploading or downloading the start bytes. The default value is 0. HTTP standard (RFC 7233 section 3.1) allows servers to ignore range requests. For HTTP PUT uploads this option should not be used, since it may conflict with other options.

Used to set to uploading or downloading the end bytes. Translate to the end if not set. HTTP standard (RFC 7233 section 3.1) allows servers to ignore range requests. For HTTP PUT uploads this option should not be used, since it may conflict with other options.
Support the application to pass in client certificates, allowing the server to verify the client's identity.

If this parameter is set, incoming DNS resolution server URL for the DoH server to use for name resolving. The parameter must be URL-encoded in the following format: "https://host:port/path". It MUST specify an HTTPS URL.

If this parameter is set, use the specified DNS server for DNS resolution. Multiple DNS resolution servers can be set up, with a maximum of 3 servers. Only take the first three if there are more than three.
The maximum limit of the response body. The default value is 5 * 1024 * 1024, in Byte. The maximum value is 100 * 1024 *1024, in Byte.
The data fields which is supported by the HTTP protocol to post forms and by the SMTP and IMAP protocols to provide the email data to send/upload.
Certificate pinning option. If server certificate's digest does not match {@link CertificatePinning.publicKeyHash}, request will fail.
Certificate authority(CA) which is used to verify the remote server's identification.
TLS option.
HTTP server authentication settings. No authentication by default.
Address family option.
Supports specifying the user custom defined http request method
Support specifying a preferred network when making HTTP requests. If the specified network is unavailable, the default network will be selected to send the request.
Support specifying the configuration of maximum redirect count
Support specifying an SNI domain name to include the SNI field during the TLS connection process
HTTP server authentication.
Credential of server.
Authentication type of server. If not set, negotiate with the server.
TlsOptions. 'system': use system tls configuration. TlsOption: tls version range, and specify cipher suite.
Remote Validation Type.
The server's authentication type.
The secure communication protocol.
HTTP request path preference. This is only a suggestion of the caller, and the system decides which path to use.
HTTP credential. Some server or proxy server need this.
Username of credential. Default is ''.
Password of credential. Default is ''.
TLS config.
Minimum version num of Tls protocol.
Maximum version num of Tls protocol.
CipherSuites, cipherSuits must match tsl version, otherswise will set all system-supported cipherSuits.
Cipher suite which TLS1.3+ support. The framework has a built-in preference order, but your choice will be recorded.
Cipher suite which TLS1.2+ support.
Cipher suite which TLS1.0+ support.
Include all cipher suite.
TLS1.3 cipher suite should include TLS1.2 cipher suite.
TLS1.2 cipher suite should include TLS1.1 cipher suite.
TLS1.1 cipher suite is same as TLS1.0 cipher suite.
TLS1.0 cipher suite.
Enum for Tls version
Tls version 1.0
Tls version 1.1
Tls version 1.2
Tls version 1.3
Represents the properties of a form object.
MIME name for the data field.
Content type of the data field.
Remote file name for the data field.
This parameter sets a mime part's body content from memory data.

This parameter sets a mime part's body content from the file's contents. This is an alternative to curl_mime_data for setting data to a mime part. If data is empty, filePath must be set. If data has a value, filePath does not take effect.
Enum for certificate types
PEM format certificate
DER format certificate
P12 format certificate

The clientCert field of the client certificate, which includes 4 attributes: client certificate (cert), client certificate type (certType), certificate private key (key), and passphrase (keyPassword).
The path to the client certificate file.
The type of the client certificate.
The path of the client certificate private key file.
Password required to use the client certificate private key.
Certificate pinning option.
Public key hash.
Certificate public key hash algorithm.
Defines an HTTP request task. Before invoking APIs provided by HttpRequest, you must call createHttp() to create an HttpRequestTask object.
Initiates an HTTP request to a given URL.
注释信息: @param { string } url - URL for initiating an HTTP request.
@param { AsyncCallback<HttpResponse> } callback - the callback of request.
@throws { BusinessError } 2300003 - Invalid URL format or missing URL.
@throws { BusinessError } 2300005 - Failed to resolve the proxy name.
@throws { BusinessError } 2300006 - Failed to resolve the host name.
@throws { BusinessError } 2300007 - Failed to connect to the server.
@throws { BusinessError } 2300009 - Access to the remote resource denied.
@throws { BusinessError } 2300016 - Error in the HTTP2 framing layer.
@throws { BusinessError } 2300023 - Failed to write the received data to the disk or application.
@throws { BusinessError } 2300026 - Failed to open or read local data from the file or application.
@throws { BusinessError } 2300047 - The number of redirections reaches the maximum allowed.
@throws { BusinessError } 2300052 - The server returned nothing (no header or data).
@throws { BusinessError } 2300055 - Failed to send data to the peer.
@throws { BusinessError } 2300056 - Failed to receive data from the peer.
@throws { BusinessError } 2300059 - The specified SSL cipher cannot be used.
@throws { BusinessError } 2300060 - Invalid SSL peer certificate or SSH remote key.
@throws { BusinessError } 2300077 - The SSL CA certificate does not exist or is inaccessible.
@throws { BusinessError } 2300998 - It is not allowed to access this domain.

parameters.说明: URL for initiating an HTTP request.

error_codes.description: Invalid URL format or missing URL.
Failed to resolve the proxy name.
Failed to resolve the host name.
Failed to connect to the server.
Access to the remote resource denied.
Error in the HTTP2 framing layer.
Failed to write the received data to the disk or application.
Failed to open or read local data from the file or application.
The number of redirections reaches the maximum allowed.
The server returned nothing (no header or data).
Failed to send data to the peer.
Failed to receive data from the peer.
The specified SSL cipher cannot be used.
Invalid SSL peer certificate or SSH remote key.
The SSL CA certificate does not exist or is inaccessible.
It is not allowed to access this domain.

Defines an HTTP request method.
OPTIONS method.
GET method.
HEAD method.
POST method.
PUT method.
DELETE method.
TRACE method.
CONNECT method.
Enumerates the response codes for an HTTP request.
The request was successful. Typically used for GET and POST requests.
Successfully requested and created a new resource.
The request has been accepted but has not been processed completely.
Unauthorized information. The request was successful.
No content. The server successfully processed, but did not return content.
Reset the content.
Partial content. The server successfully processed some GET requests.
Multiple options.
Permanently move. The requested resource has been permanently moved to a new URI, and the returned information will include the new URI. The browser will automatically redirect to the new URI.
Temporary movement.
View other addresses.
Not modified.
Using proxies.
The server cannot understand the syntax error error requested by the client.
Request for user authentication.
Reserved for future use.
The server understands the request from the requesting client, but refuses to execute it.
The server was unable to find resources (web pages) based on the client's request.
The method in the client request is prohibited.
The server is unable to complete the request based on the content characteristics requested by the client.
Request authentication of the proxy's identity.
The request took too long and timed out.
The server may have returned this code when completing the client's PUT request, as there was a conflict when the server was processing the request.
The resource requested by the client no longer exists.
The server is unable to process request information sent by the client without Content Length.
The prerequisite for requesting information from the client is incorrect.
The request was rejected because the requested entity was too large for the server to process.
The requested URI is too long (usually a URL) and the server cannot process it.
The server is unable to process the requested format.
The server cannot process the requested data range.
Internal server error, unable to complete the request.
The server does not support the requested functionality and cannot complete the request.
The server acting as a gateway or proxy received an invalid request from the remote server.
Due to overload or system maintenance, the server is temporarily unable to process client requests.
The server acting as a gateway or proxy did not obtain requests from the remote server in a timely manner.
The version of the HTTP protocol requested by the server.
Supported protocols.
Protocol http1.1
Protocol http2
Protocol http3 for https only. Cause error if using http only or not supporting http3 on this device. Fallback to http2 or http1.1 if needed.
Indicates the type of the returned data.
The returned type is string.
The returned type is Object.
The returned type is ArrayBuffer.
Defines the response to an HTTP request.
result can be a string (API 6) or an ArrayBuffer(API 8). Object is deprecated from API 8. If {@link HttpRequestOptions#expectDataType} is set, the system preferentially returns this parameter.

If the resultType is string, you can get result directly. If the resultType is Object, you can get result such as this: result['key']. If the resultType is ArrayBuffer, you can use ArrayBuffer to create the binary objects.
Server status code.
All headers in the response from the server.
Cookies returned by the server.
The time taken of various stages of HTTP request.
Counting the time taken of various stages of HTTP request.
Time taken from startup to DNS resolution completion, in milliseconds.
Time taken from startup to TCP connection completion, in milliseconds.
Time taken from startup to TLS connection completion, in milliseconds.
Time taken from startup to start sending the first byte, in milliseconds.
Time taken from startup to receiving the first byte, in milliseconds.
Time taken from startup to the completion of the request, in milliseconds.
Time taken from startup to completion of all redirection steps, in milliseconds.
Time taken from HTTP request to header completion, in milliseconds.
Time taken from HTTP Request to body completion, in milliseconds.
Time taken from HTTP Request to callback to the application, in milliseconds.
This interface is used to obtain the progress information of file upload or download.
Number of data bytes received.
Total number of bytes to receive.
This interface is used to monitor the progress of sending data.
Used to specify the data size to be sent.
Total number of bytes to receive.
Creates a default {@code HttpResponseCache} object to store the responses of HTTP access requests.
注释信息: @param { number } cacheSize - the size of cache(max value is 10MB), default is 10*1024*1024(10MB).
@returns { HttpResponseCache } the HttpResponseCache of the createHttpResponseCache.

parameters.说明: the size of cache(max value is 10MB), default is 10*1024*1024(10MB).

节点.功能描述: Defines an object that stores the response to an HTTP request.
Writes data in the cache to the file system so that all the cached data can be accessed in the next HTTP request.
注释信息: @param { AsyncCallback<void> } callback - the callback of flush.

节点.功能描述: Writes data in the cache to the file system so that all the cached data can be accessed in the next HTTP request.
注释信息: @returns { Promise<void> } The promise returned by the flush.
节点.return_description: The promise returned by the flush.

节点.功能描述: Disables a cache and deletes the data in it.

节点.功能描述: Disables a cache and deletes the data in it.
注释信息: @returns { Promise<void> } The promise returned by the delete.
节点.return_description: The promise returned by the delete.

节点.功能描述: Types of an HTTP interceptor.
Intercept after the initial HTTP request is assembled.
Intercept when we get a redirection responsed and is going to send another request.
Intercept after we checked the HTTP cache.
Intercept when we perform network connection, such as TLS and TCP.
Intercept when we get the final HTTP response.
The request data.
The URL of an HTTP request interceptor. It can be modified in an interceptor.
The header of an HTTP request interceptor. It can be modified in an interceptor.
The header of an HTTP request interceptor. It can be modified in an interceptor.
Whether or not to continue process of interceptor chain.
Defines an HTTP Interceptor. User can implement this interface to define the handle function.
The type of this interceptor. It defines when this intercptor would be called.
Intercept an HTTP process and do changes as disired.
注释信息: @param { HttpRequestContext } reqContext - the context of the target HTTP request.
@param { HttpResponse } rspContext - the context of the target HTTP response.
@returns { Promise<ChainContinue> } Continue the HTTP process or terminate then return the HTTP response.

parameters.说明: the context of the target HTTP request.
the context of the target HTTP response.

节点.return_description: Continue the HTTP process or terminate then return the HTTP response.

节点.功能描述: Defines an HTTP Interceptor chain.
The method to get the chain of interceptors.
Add an interceptor chain to the HTTP client.
注释信息: @param { HttpInterceptor[] } chain - The chain of interceptors.
@returns { boolean } Whether the chain is added successfully.
@throws { BusinessError } 2300801 - Parameter type not supported by the interceptor.
@throws { BusinessError } 2300802 - Duplicated interceptor type in the chain.
节点.return_description: Whether the chain is added successfully.

error_codes.description: Parameter type not supported by the interceptor.
Duplicated interceptor type in the chain.

节点.功能描述: Attach the chain to the target http request. Only one chain can be attached to a given request.
注释信息: @param { HttpRequest } httpRequest - Initiates an HTTP request to a given URL.
@returns { boolean } Whether the interceptor chain is attached successfully.
@throws { BusinessError } 2300801 - Parameter type not supported by the interceptor.

parameters.说明: Initiates an HTTP request to a given URL.

节点.return_description: Whether the interceptor chain is attached successfully.
